subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! How can my tongue move forth and how can my fingers stir, when my sorrows surge like the waves of the Crimson Sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی کیف یدلع لسانی و کیف یتحرک بنانی و ان احزانی تموج موج القلزم
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for the departed, @consolation and comfort
